update_every.title: Update every
update_every.description: Data collection interval, measured in seconds. CloudWatch's minimum period is 60s.

autodetection_retry.title: Detection retry
autodetection_retry.description: Recheck interval in seconds. Zero means no recheck.

vnode.title: Vnode
vnode.description: Associates this data collection job with a Virtual Node.

credentials.title: Credential sources
credentials.description: Named sources used by monitored targets. A source uses either the AWS SDK default chain or explicit static/session credentials.

name.title: Name
name.description: Stable credential source name referenced by monitored targets.

type.title: Type
type.description: How this source obtains its base AWS credentials.

type_static.title: Static credential configuration
type_static.description: Explicit long-lived or temporary AWS credentials. Prefer secret references instead of plaintext values.

access_key_id.title: Access key ID
access_key_id.description: AWS access key ID. Use a go.d secret reference such as ${env:AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID}.

secret_access_key.title: Secret access key
secret_access_key.description: AWS secret access key. Use a go.d secret reference; do not store plaintext credentials in the configuration.

session_token.title: Session token
session_token.description: Optional AWS session token when the access key identifies temporary credentials.

targets.title: Monitored targets
targets.description: Named AWS identities to monitor. A target uses one credential source directly or uses it to assume one role.

external_id.title: External ID
external_id.description: Value supplied by the role owner when its trust policy requires one. It is not an AWS password or access key.

rules.title: Collection rules
rules.description: Ordered target, profile, metric, region, and resource-filter selections. The earliest matching rule and target own each overlapping exported metric/statistic series.

targets.title: Targets
targets.description: Ordered target references. Order breaks overlap ties within this rule.

profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.description: Omit to select default-enabled profiles. Include adds profiles; exclude removes profiles.

metrics.title: Metrics
metrics.description: Optional per-profile exact metric/statistic allowlists that narrow the profiles selected by this rule. Omit metrics to collect every metric exported by those profiles.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Profile basename. It must already be selected by this rule's profiles option and may appear in only one metrics group.

statistics.title: Default statistics
statistics.description: Default statistics inherited by included metrics that omit their own statistics. Named AWS statistics are case-insensitive.

include.title: Included metrics
include.description: Exact, case-sensitive AWS MetricNames. A metric-level statistics list replaces the group default.

name.title: AWS MetricName
name.description: Exact, case-sensitive CloudWatch MetricName exported by the profile.

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.description: Optional replacement for the group default. Use Average, Minimum, Maximum, Sum, SampleCount, or p<N>; named statistics are case-insensitive.

regions.title: Regions
regions.description: AWS regions collected by this rule. Profile-specific supported-region restrictions are applied automatically.

filters.title: Resource filters
filters.description: Selection predicates for this rule. Omit resource_tags to inherit the job default; set it to an empty list to disable the default for this rule.

resource_tags.title: AWS resource tag filters
resource_tags.description: Replaces the job-default resource tag filters for this rule. All keys must match; any listed value may match for one key. Keys and values are exact and case-sensitive. An explicitly included profile without a safe resource-tag association is rejected.

query.title: Query policy
query.description: Optional CloudWatch query timing overrides for this rule. Omitted fields inherit rule defaults and profile values.

period.title: Aggregation period
period.description: CloudWatch aggregation period. Must be from 1m through 1d and an exact multiple of 1m. A period shorter than the metric's real publication cadence increases query frequency without making AWS publish more often.

lookback.title: Rolling lookback
lookback.description: Rolling query horizon. Must be at least the effective period, an exact period multiple, and no more than 1,440 buckets.

publication_delay.title: Publication delay
publication_delay.description: Collector policy for how long to wait after a bucket closes before querying it. This is not an AWS publication guarantee. Use 0s only for metrics known to publish immediately.

rule_defaults.title: Rule defaults
rule_defaults.description: Job-wide defaults inherited by collection rules that do not replace them.

resource_tags.title: Default AWS resource tag filters
resource_tags.description: Select only resources matching these exact tags unless a rule replaces or explicitly disables the list. All keys must match; any listed value may match for one key. Default-selected profiles without a safe resource-tag association are skipped with a diagnostic.

query.title: Default query policy
query.description: Shared CloudWatch query timing inherited field-by-field by collection rules.

period.title: Aggregation period
period.description: Default CloudWatch aggregation period. A period shorter than a metric's real publication cadence increases query frequency without making AWS publish more often.

publication_delay.title: Publication delay
publication_delay.description: Default collector wait after a bucket closes. This is a scheduling policy, not an AWS publication guarantee.

labels.title: Resource labels
labels.description: Optional AWS resource tags copied to every matching Netdata chart as non-identity labels.

label.title: Netdata label
label.description: Optional label key. When omitted, the AWS tag key is normalized to a Netdata label key.

limits.title: Collection limits
limits.description: Operator safeguards that reject unexpectedly large compiled work without truncating collection.

max_instances.title: Maximum instances
max_instances.description: Maximum distinct final CloudWatch resource instances. Metric and statistic fan-out is not counted. Raise this explicitly for intentionally larger jobs.

max_discovery_groups.title: Maximum discovery groups
max_discovery_groups.description: Maximum unique target, region, and CloudWatch namespace combinations. The default catches accidental expansion. Valid range 1–100; split larger collection across jobs.

timeout.title: Timeout
timeout.description: AWS operation timeout in seconds. Discovery shares one timeout across its whole refresh stage.

update_every.ui:help: How often to collect CloudWatch metrics. CloudWatch metric periods are at least 60 seconds.

autodetection_retry.ui:help: How often to retry a failed job check. Set to `0` to disable retries.

timeout.ui:help: AWS operation timeout. Identity, resource-tag, and query operations use it for their operation scope; discovery shares one timeout across its whole refresh stage. Accepts decimals for sub-second granularity (for example, `0.5` for 500ms).

credentials.ui:help: Define one or more named credential sources. `default` uses the AWS SDK credential chain. `static` reveals a `type_static` section for explicit long-lived or temporary credentials. Reference these names from monitored targets.

name.ui:help: Stable credential source name referenced by monitored targets.

type.ui:help: Choose how Netdata gets base AWS credentials: `default` uses the AWS SDK credential chain and `static` uses explicit long-lived or temporary credentials.

access_key_id.ui:help: AWS access key ID. Prefer a go.d secret reference.

secret_access_key.ui:help: AWS secret access key. Use a go.d secret reference instead of plaintext.

session_token.ui:help: Optional session token for temporary AWS credentials.

targets.ui:help: Define the AWS identities to monitor. Each target references one credential source and may use it to assume one IAM role.

name.ui:help: Stable target name referenced by collection rules.

credentials.ui:help: Name of a credential source defined on the Credentials tab.

role_arn.ui:help: IAM role assumed before collecting this target. Leave the Assume role section empty to use the base credentials directly.

external_id.ui:help: Optional external ID supplied by the role owner when required by the role trust policy.

rules.ui:help: Add ordered collection rules. The earliest matching rule and target own each overlapping exported metric/statistic series.

name.ui:help: Stable rule name used in validation and diagnostics.

targets.ui:help: Ordered target names collected by this rule.

profiles.ui:help: Choose which stock or user CloudWatch profiles this rule collects. Omit this section to use all default-enabled profiles.

defaults.ui:help: Include all default-enabled profiles before applying include and exclude lists.

exclude.ui:help: Profile basenames to remove from this rule's selection.

metrics.ui:help: Optional exact allowlists grouped by profile. Omit this list to collect every metric exported by the selected profiles.

profile.ui:help: Profile basename already selected by this rule. Add each profile at most once.

statistics.ui:help: Default AWS statistics inherited by metrics that omit their own list.

include.ui:help: Exact AWS MetricNames. A metric-level statistics list replaces the group default.

name.ui:help: Exact, case-sensitive AWS MetricName from the profile.

statistics.ui:help: Optional replacement statistics for this metric.

regions.ui:help: AWS regions collected by this rule. Unsupported profile/region combinations are handled automatically.

filters.ui:help: Omit Resource tags to inherit the job default. A non-empty list replaces the default; an explicit empty list disables tag filtering for this rule.

resource_tags.ui:help: Exact, case-sensitive AWS tag predicates. All keys must match; any value listed for one key may match. Explicitly included profiles must support safe resource-tag association.

values.ui:help: Accepted exact values for this key.

query.ui:help: Override CloudWatch timing for this rule. Omitted fields inherit rule defaults and profile values. A successful query may replay the newest eligible value for up to the lookback; transient failures may replay it longer.

period.ui:help: Aggregation period used by CloudWatch and for per-second rate normalization. Do not set it below the metric's real publication cadence: that adds billed queries and may produce empty windows.

lookback.ui:help: Rolling window searched for the newest eligible datapoint. Longer windows increase response work.

publication_delay.ui:help: Collector wait after a period closes before querying it. This is not an AWS publication guarantee.

rule_defaults.ui:help: Defaults inherited by rules that do not provide their own value.

resource_tags.ui:help: Default exact AWS resource tag predicates. All keys must match; any listed value may match for one key. Unsupported default-selected profiles are skipped and reported.

key.ui:help: Exact, case-sensitive AWS resource tag key.

values.ui:help: Accepted exact, case-sensitive values for this key.

query.ui:help: Shared query timing inherited field-by-field by collection rules.

period.ui:help: Default aggregation period inherited by rules. Do not set it below participating metrics' real publication cadence: that adds billed queries and may produce empty windows.

lookback.ui:help: Default rolling window inherited by rules. A successful query can present an old CloudWatch value as current for up to this lookback; transient failures can replay it longer. Longer windows also increase response work.

publication_delay.ui:help: Default collector wait inherited by every rule that omits it. This overrides profile-specific delays, including the stock S3 storage profile's conservative 1d policy. AWS documents that S3 storage metrics are reported once per day, but does not guarantee publication within one day. Use a shorter default only after verifying every inheriting workload.

resource_tags.ui:help: Copy selected AWS tags to Netdata chart labels. This affects presentation only and does not select resources.

label.ui:help: Optional Netdata label key. Leave empty to normalize the AWS tag key automatically.

max_instances.ui:help: Maximum distinct final resource instances that emit at least one selected series after filtering and overlap resolution. Raise this only for an intentionally larger job.

max_discovery_groups.ui:help: Safeguard for unique target, region, and namespace discovery groups. Compatible rules and profiles share groups. The default 64 is intended to catch accidental expansion; the hard maximum is 100 because every group needs at least one ListMetrics operation in the bounded refresh. Split larger collection across jobs.

refresh_every.ui:help: How often to rediscover matching CloudWatch metrics and resources.

recently_active_only.ui:help: When enabled, use CloudWatch's three-hour filter only when every selected series sharing a namespace scan has publication_delay + lookback + period of three hours or less. A longer-horizon participant keeps the shared scan unfiltered.

vnode.ui:help: Optional virtual node name used to group all charts from this job under a specific Netdata virtual node.
vnode.ui:placeholder: To use this option, first create a Virtual Node and then reference its name here.
